b.abt.1431 of Kirby, Leicestershire, England; s/o Leonard Hastings and Alice (Philipa) Camoys (Camois)d.June 13, 1483 Londonbur.St. George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Englandm.F …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Camoys於1400年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可時，她的父親Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG49歲，母親Elizabeth Louches48歲。她於大約1425年與Sir Leonard Hastings在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1455年10月20日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格倫費爾德享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾基爾比。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Camoys was born in 1400, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, was 49 and her mother, Elizabeth Louches, was 48. She married Sir Leonard Hastings about 1425, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 20 October 1455, in Glenfield, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Kilby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Camoys est née en 1400, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Louches, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Leonard Hastings environ 1425, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1455, à Glenfield, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Camoys 1400 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG 49 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Louches 48. Sie hat um 1425 in England Sir Leonard Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Oktober 1455 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Glenfield, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Camoys è nata il nel 1400 nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Louches, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Sir Leonard Hastings circa 1425, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 ottobre 1455, nel Glenfield, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Camoysが1400年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクで生まれた時，父Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KGは49歳，母Elizabeth Louchesは48歳であった。約1425年にイギリスでSir Leonard Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1455年10月20日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグレンフィールドで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Camoys(이)가 1400년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Louches(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1425년 영국에서 Sir Leonard Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1455년 10월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 글렌필드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 킬비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Camoys nasceu em 1400, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Louches, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Leonard Hastings aproximadamente 1425, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1455, em Glenfield, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Camoys родилась в 1400 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Louches, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Leonard Hastings около 1425 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 20 октября 1455 г. в местности гленфиелд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности килби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Camoys nació en 1400, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Louches, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Sir Leonard Hastings aproximadamente 1425, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1455, en Glenfield, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Kilby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
